assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: The response clearly categorizes notifications with specific mentions of auto-upgrade notifications, security patches, end-of-life warnings, and version updates in the triage matrix and automated script

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: The triage matrix assigns security patches to CRITICAL priority (highest) and patch version updates/new features to LOW priority (lowest), with clear urgency levels defined

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: End-of-life warnings are categorized as CRITICAL when <30 days remain, with specific actions including scheduling upgrades and notifying stakeholders before deprecation

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Auto-upgrade notifications are assigned HIGH priority with specific actions including testing in staging, reviewing breaking changes, and preparing rollback strategies

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Security patches with CVE 7.0+ are marked CRITICAL with 24-48 hour timeline and actions including scheduling emergency maintenance windows outside normal procedures

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Minor and patch version updates are categorized as MEDIUM/LOW priority with planning-focused actions like 'Add to upgrade roadmap' and 'No immediate action required'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: The response includes a monitoring section with PrometheusRule configuration for GKE upgrade alerts and mentions Cloud Monitoring in the context of tracking upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: The response does not specifically mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes, focusing instead on automated classification and action plans
